Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

The default wait time in wait_update_facet is 90s, it should be enough for most cases, otherwise, you can increase it to a larger number. I'm not familiar with ZFS snapshot, but I don't think trying to take snapshots to wait is a good way.

parents.subject: LU-17076 nrs: wait for RCU completion

commit.subject: LU-17209 osd-zfs: Limit failures in lsnapshot test_4
commit.message:
LU-17209 osd-zfs: Limit failures in lsnapshot test_4

The current lsnapshot test bounces the mgs and waits
for the initial number of connections to match.

This test fails due to connections not being established or
additional connections adding after the mgs is bounced.

The connection count mismatches are not fatal so don't
fail when the occur.

In addition an lsnapshot may occur before the lustre
file system is fully restored. The snapshot will normally succeed
with an additional small delay, so retry the snapshot in such cases.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-8294
Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs testlist=sanity-lsnapshot
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ie47eceafa19693ad8ba4e1bd772b424d8cc1db95
